headline: Eaton announces David Foster as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, effective March 2, 2026
summary: DUBLIN, March 02, 2026--Intelligent power management company Eaton (NYSE:ETN) today announced that David Foster has been named executive vice president and chief financial officer, effective March 2, 2026. He succeeds Olivier Leonetti who will be leaving Eaton on March 13, 2026, as part of a planned transition.
